title: Pelagic claim: repo-continuity truth repair after Cycle 4 intent abandoned
body: claim 8e48a99b-7f53-4b28-a504-de3d8aae73cb open on repo-continuity + critical-drain plan + napkin only. Live evidence: HEAD e8ca6d08; active queue []; Charcoal abandoned Cycle 4 intent 7dc6f8cc after README pathspec conflict and retained PDR-076b body edit under claim b8cb39de. Updating live knowledge surfaces only; no archive/stage/commit; staying off Charcoal PDR/README files.
